evals.name: basic-boot-screenshot
evals.expected_output: 의존성 검증 → 디바이스 목록 조회 → 최신 iPhone 부팅 → 스크린샷 캡처 → Session Report 출력
expectations: Agent runs dependency verification (xcrun simctl help and maestro --version) before any simulator command
Agent lists available devices with xcrun simctl list devices
Agent selects the latest iPhone model and boots it by UDID
Agent captures a screenshot with xcrun simctl io booted screenshot
Agent reports device name, iOS version, and UDID
Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report matching the Output Format template
Agent asks user whether to shut down or keep running at the end

evals.name: maestro-login-flow
evals.prompt: 로그인 플로우를 Maestro로 자동화해줘. appId는 com.example.app이고 이메일/비밀번호 입력 후 Submit
evals.expected_output: Maestro YAML 플로우 파일 maestro/login-submit.yaml 생성 → maestro test 실행 → 결과 보고
expectations: Agent runs dependency verification before any command
Agent creates a Maestro YAML flow file at maestro/login-submit.yaml following the {feature}-{action}.yaml naming pattern
Agent includes appId: com.example.app in the YAML flow
Agent includes tapOn, inputText steps for email and password fields
Agent includes a Submit tap and assertVisible for success state
Agent attempts to run maestro test on the created flow
Agent captures screenshots after UI-modifying actions
Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report with Maestro Flow Results section

evals.name: android-redirect
evals.expected_output: OUT of scope 인식 → mobile-dev로 리다이렉트
expectations: Agent recognizes this as out of scope within 1-2 sentences
Agent explicitly mentions mobile-dev as the correct agent for Android emulator
Agent does NOT attempt to run any xcrun simctl or maestro commands
Agent does NOT attempt to install Android SDK or emulator tools
